mapper.select: SELECT id as id, dealerId as dealerId, (select dealerName from dealer where id = dealerId) as dealerName, productName as productName, orderDate as orderDate, quantity as quantity, price as price, totalAmount as totalAmount, marketFee as marketFee, giftQuantity as giftQuantity, expectRate as expectRate, realRate as realRate, balanceFee as balanceFee FROM sale_order LIMIT #{start}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sale_order (dealerId, productName, orderDate, quantity, price, totalAmount, marketFee, giftQuantity, expectRate, realRate, balanceFee ) VALUES( #{dealerId}, #{productName}, #{orderDate}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{totalAmount}, #{marketFee}, #{giftQuantity}, #{expectRate}, #{realRate}, #{balanceFee} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sale_order SET dealerId=#{dealerId}, productName=#{productName}, orderDate=#{orderDate}, quantity=#{quantity}, price=#{price}, totalAmount=#{totalAmount}, marketFee=#{marketFee}, giftQuantity=#{giftQuantity}, expectRate=#{expectRate}, realRate=#{realRate}, balanceFee=#{balanceFee} WHERE id=#{id}
